A system analogous to proportional representation of desires. Run by mythologies. Inspired by [[Richard Dawkins]] and [[the selfish gene]] and lost votes in [[first past the post]] <ref name=":0">[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 41 up to 24:00</ref>

[[Immanuelle Leonhart]] says it is the best argument for collectivism, but most esoteric, as it represents values not held by individuals but only by collectives<ref name=":0" />

May be related to collective shadow but not necessarily<ref name=":0" />

== References ==
<references />
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Collective desire synthesis]][[sn:Collective desire synthesis]][[Category:Desire synthesis]]
[[sn:Collective desire synthesis]][[Category:Organizational behavior‏‎]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
